creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Ideally, EFL should switch to libseat. Even consolekit2 isn't that well supported outside of X11. Both wlroots (e.g., x11-wm/wayfire), smithay (e.g., x11-wm/niri) and even weston (not in ports) use libseat to abstract away logind vs. consolekit2 vs. seatd dependency.
